title: D0 Tile Event Contracts
source_policy: Derived from the byte-equivalent D0 source scaffold and the C0:062A consumer. This records chain boundaries, event-condition headers, replacement-pair rows, and consumer-backed field names only.

event_control_pointer_row.consumer: C0:0703 indexes D0:1598 by tileset/event-control id and adds the low word to bank D0

tile_event_condition_header.consumer: C0:0715 treats zero as chain terminator, masks 0x7FFF for C2:1628, and uses bit 15 as the expected flag state
C0:0722 uses this count to walk four-byte replacement pairs

tile_event_replacement_pair.consumer: C0:074D passes this as A to REPLACE_BLOCK, selecting the destination active block/cache slot
C0:074A passes this as X/Y to REPLACE_BLOCK, selecting the source active block/cache slot
